description: Solana DeFi risk intel over x402: rug/honeypot scans, pool analysis, wash-filtered pools.
name: io.github.thomenz/soldefi-mcp

environmentVariables.description: base58 or JSON-array secret key of a DEDICATED Solana wallet holding USDC (pays per call). Configure this and/or EVM_PRIVATE_KEY; the x402 layer settles on whichever rail the 402 advertises. Paid tools return 402 without one; the free validate_mint tool still works.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: 0x private key of a DEDICATED wallet holding USDC on Base (pays per call). Configure this and/or SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY; the x402 layer settles on whichever rail the 402 advertises. Paid tools return 402 without one; the free validate_mint tool still works.
environmentVariables.name: EVM_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Solana RPC override used to build the payment (e.g. a Helius URL). Only read when SOLANA_PRIVATE_KEY is set.
environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a soldefi Worker. Defaults to the hosted production API (https://soldefi.thomenz.me).
environmentVariables.name: SOLDEFI_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'base-sepolia' to pay on testnet, which switches BOTH rails (Solana devnet + Base Sepolia). Any other value, including unset, pays on mainnet.
environmentVariables.name: X402_NETWORK
